title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: 6 reports reviewed and closed. Actions taken: banned spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels), banned toxic_runner (repeated targeted harassment of newcomers), warned bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation — near-identical replies in help channels). report_006 (core_maintainer) closed as false positive — mass reporting by brigading users after a moderation decision. report_003 (trusted_helper) closed — single-user dispute during moderation disagreement, no pattern found. report_004 (new_member_17) closed — minor formatting/off-topic issue.
